label: Tavily
description: AI-optimized web search API that returns pre-formatted results for LLM and agent consumption.

form.title: Connect Tavily
form.subtitle: Paste your Tavily API key to give Anton real-time web search tuned for AI agents.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste a Tavily API key (tvly-…) from your dashboard. Takes 30 seconds — no OAuth flow, no scopes to configure.
methods.how_to:
## Get your Tavily API key

1. Open [app.tavily.com](https://app.tavily.com) and sign in (or create a free account).
2. Click **API Keys** in the left sidebar.
3. Copy an existing key that starts with `tvly-`, or click **Generate API Key** to create a new one.
4. Paste the key into the **API Key** field below and click **Submit**.

## Notes

- Free-tier accounts include a limited number of searches per month; upgrade in the Tavily dashboard for higher quotas.
- Treat the key like a password — anyone with it can consume your search quota.
- If you suspect a key is compromised, return to **API Keys** in the dashboard, revoke the old key, and generate a new one.
- See [Tavily API docs](https://docs.tavily.com/docs/tavily-api/introduction) for full rate-limit and pricing details.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found at app.tavily.com → API Keys. Starts with tvly-.
